description_long: This is a large, modern residential house complex set on a spacious green lot with manicured lawns and several mature trees. The structure features multiple interconnected volumes with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white and beige exterior finishes. The property includes a main house, a secondary building, a swimming pool, a circular hot tub, and a shaded outdoor pavilion. The landscaping is carefully designed, with hedges and trees providing privacy and visual interest around the perimeter. The house has expansive patios and terraces, some with outdoor seating, and a driveway leading to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, multi-volume house complex with flat roofs, large windows, and extensive landscaping, featuring a pool, hot tub, and outdoor pavilion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house facade, driveway, and a portion of the lawn with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the secondary building, dense tree coverage, and the connection between the main and secondary structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, hot tub, large patio areas, and the outdoor pavilion, with the main house's curved terrace prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary building, more of the lawn, and the relationship between the two main structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with a flat overhang, steps leading up, and a minimalist approach with no ornate columns.
